reviews.review_description:
i downloaded this on my headset after seeing it on the store and trying it  and thought this was very relaxing.  

store asked to choose a subscription but headset did not but i dont seem to be able to find inything in the app to purchase.  

so i was wondering what are users actually subscribing too if this app is gotten from the store as oppossed to via their headset as everything is unlocked/working in the game nothing to buy at all ?
